summary: Tested PlayXBets dynamic odds spread formula and enhanced betting history features. All 24 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified for admin and user betting history pages with filters, summary cards, and CSV download buttons.
seed_data_creation: None - using existing 20 bets in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: All dynamic odds spread and statement features verified working. Key findings: (1) Dynamic spread formula working correctly: spread = max(0.01, round(back/20, 2)). Example: back=1.85 → lay=1.94 (spread 0.09), back=2.18 → lay=2.29 (spread 0.11). (2) GET /api/matches applies dynamic spread at serving time. (3) GET /api/match/{match_id} also applies dynamic spread. (4) Admin betting history at /admin/bets returns bets array + summary with total_bets, total_stake, won, lost, pending. (5) Admin filters work: period=day|week|month, status=won|lost|pending. (6) Admin CSV download at /admin/statements/download?period=day|week|month returns proper CSV with headers. (7) User betting history at /bets/history returns bets + P&L summary with total_stake, total_won, total_lost, net_pnl. (8) User CSV download at /statements/download?period=day|week|month works. (9) Frontend routes: Admin bets at /admin/bets, User history at /user/history.

dynamic_odds_spread.details: Formula spread = max(0.01, round(back/20, 2)) verified. Example: back=1.85 → lay=1.94, back=2.18 → lay=2.29

matches_endpoint_spread.details: GET /api/matches returns odds with dynamic spread applied at serving time

match_detail_spread.details: GET /api/match/{match_id} returns odds with dynamic spread applied

admin_bets_endpoint.details: GET /api/admin/bets returns {bets:[], summary:{total_bets, total_stake, total_payout, won, lost, pending}}

admin_bets_filters.details: Filters work: period=day|week|month, status=won|lost|pending, combined filters

admin_statement_download.details: GET /api/admin/statements/download?period=day|week|month returns CSV with proper headers

user_bets_history.details: GET /api/bets/history returns {bets:[], summary:{total_stake, total_won, total_lost, net_pnl}}

admin_ui_betting_history.details: Admin Bets Placed page loads with summary cards (20 bets, 30080 stake, 9 won, 2 lost, 9 pending), filters, download buttons

user_ui_bet_history.details: User Bet History page loads with P&L summary (37525.7 won, 1300 lost, +36225.7 net P&L), filters, download buttons

homepage_odds_display.details: Homepage shows matches with dynamic odds (e.g., 1.85/2.18, 2.16/1.83, 2.15/1.9)

match_detail_odds_display.details: Match detail page shows back/lay odds with dynamic spread (blue=back, red=lay)

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints use real data from MongoDB

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/homepage_odds_display.png - Homepage with matches showing dynamic odds
.screenshots/match_detail_odds.png - Match detail with back=1.85/lay=1.94 and back=2.18/lay=2.29
.screenshots/admin_bets_placed.png - Admin betting history with 20 bets, summary cards, filters
.screenshots/user_bet_history_correct.png - User bet history with P&L summary +36,225.7
